```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,56 @@
+# 全栈 Monorepo 项目
+
+基于 pnpm + Turborepo 的全栈项目，包含 Next.js 和 Vite React 应用。
+
+## 技术栈
+
+- **Monorepo**: pnpm workspace + Turborepo
+- **前端框架**: Next.js + React + Vite
+- **UI 组件**: shadcn/ui
+- **样式**: Tailwind CSS
+- **后端服务**: Supabase
+- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions
+
+## 项目结构
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+.
+├── apps/
+│   ├── web/          # Next.js 应用
+│   └── client/       # Vite React 应用
+├── packages/
+│   └── ui/           # 共享 UI 组件
+├── turbo.json
+├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
+└── package.json
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+## 开发
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+# 安装依赖
+pnpm install
+
+# 启动开发服务器
+pnpm dev
+
+# 构建所有应用
+pnpm build
+
+# 代码检查
+pnpm lint
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+## 环境变量
+
+在每个应用目录下创建 &#96;.env.local&#96; 文件：
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;env
+NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
+NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_supabase_anon_key
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+## 部署
+
+项目配置了 GitHub Actions 自动部署流程，推送到 main 分支时会自动触发部署。
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+import { Inter } from "next/font/google";

+

+  title: "全栈 Monorepo 应用",
+  description: "基于 Next.js + Supabase 的全栈应用",
+};
+
+export default function RootLayout({
+  children,
+}: Readonly&lt;{
+  children: React.ReactNode;
+}&gt;) {
+  return (
+    &lt;html lang="zh"&gt;
+      &lt;body className={inter.className}&gt;{children}&lt;/body&gt;
+    &lt;/html&gt;
+  );
+}
+
```

```diff
+import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx";
+import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge";
+
+export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
+  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
+}
```

Lines added: 56, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,56 @@
+import * as React from "react";
+import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot";
+import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+const buttonVariants = cva(
+  "inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
+  {
+    variants: {
+      variant: {
+        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
+        destructive:
+          "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90",
+        outline:
+          "border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
+        secondary:
+          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
+        ghost: "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
+        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
+      },
+      size: {
+        default: "h-10 px-4 py-2",
+        sm: "h-9 rounded-md px-3",
+        lg: "h-11 rounded-md px-8",
+        icon: "h-10 w-10",
+      },
+    },
+    defaultVariants: {
+      variant: "default",
+      size: "default",
+    },
+  }
+);
+
+export interface ButtonProps
+  extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLButtonElement&gt;,
+    VariantProps&lt;typeof buttonVariants&gt; {
+  asChild?: boolean;
+}
+
+const Button = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps&gt;(
+  ({ className, variant, size, asChild = false, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {
+    const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button";
+    return (
+      &lt;Comp
+        className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
+        ref={ref}
+        {...props}
+      /&gt;
+    );
+  }
+);
+Button.displayName = "Button";
+
+export { Button, buttonVariants };
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+import * as React from "react";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+const Card = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLDivElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;div
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn(
+      "rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm",
+      className
+    )}
+    {...props}
+  /&gt;
+));
+Card.displayName = "Card";
+
+const CardHeader = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLDivElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;div
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn("flex flex-col space-y-1.5 p-6", className)}
+    {...props}
+  /&gt;
+));
+CardHeader.displayName = "CardHeader";
+
+const CardTitle = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLParagraphElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLHeadingElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;h3
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn(
+      "text-2xl font-semibold leading-none tracking-tight",
+      className
+    )}
+    {...props}
+  /&gt;
+));
+CardTitle.displayName = "CardTitle";
+
+const CardDescription = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLParagraphElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLParagraphElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;p
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn("text-sm text-muted-foreground", className)}
+    {...props}
+  /&gt;
+));
+CardDescription.displayName = "CardDescription";
+
+const CardContent = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLDivElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;div ref={ref} className={cn("p-6 pt-0", className)} {...props} /&gt;
+));
+CardContent.displayName = "CardContent";
+
+const CardFooter = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  HTMLDivElement,
+  React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;div
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn("flex items-center p-6 pt-0", className)}
+    {...props}
+  /&gt;
+));
+CardFooter.displayName = "CardFooter";
+
+export { Card, CardHeader, CardFooter, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent };
+
```

```diff
+        ring: "hsl(var(--ring))",
+      },
+      borderRadius: {
+        lg: "var(--radius)",
+        md: "calc(var(--radius) - 2px)",
+        sm: "calc(var(--radius) - 4px)",
+      },
+    },
+  },
+  plugins: [],
+};
+
+export default config;
+
```

```diff
+            &lt;/CardContent&gt;

+          &lt;Card&gt;
+            &lt;CardHeader&gt;

+          &lt;Card&gt;
+            &lt;CardHeader&gt;
+              &lt;CardTitle&gt;Monorepo&lt;/CardTitle&gt;
+              &lt;CardDescription&gt;
+                与 Next.js 应用共享代码
+              &lt;/CardDescription&gt;
+            &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+            &lt;CardContent&gt;
+              &lt;Button variant="ghost"&gt;浏览组件&lt;/Button&gt;
+            &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+          &lt;/Card&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
+export default App;
+
```

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,56 @@
+import * as React from "react";
+import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot";
+import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+const buttonVariants = cva(
+  "inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
+  {
+    variants: {
+      variant: {
+        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
+        destructive:
+          "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90",
+        outline:
+          "border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
+        secondary:
+          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
+        ghost: "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
+        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
+      },
+      size: {
+        default: "h-10 px-4 py-2",
+        sm: "h-9 rounded-md px-3",
+        lg: "h-11 rounded-md px-8",
+        icon: "h-10 w-10",
+      },
+    },
+    defaultVariants: {
+      variant: "default",
+      size: "default",
+    },
+  }
+);
+
+export interface ButtonProps
+  extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLButtonElement&gt;,
+    VariantProps&lt;typeof buttonVariants&gt; {
+  asChild?: boolean;
+}
+
+const Button = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps&gt;(
+  ({ className, variant, size, asChild = false, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {
+    const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button";
+    return (
+      &lt;Comp
+        className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
+        ref={ref}
+        {...props}
+      /&gt;
+    );
+  }
+);
+Button.displayName = "Button";
+
+export { Button, buttonVariants };
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,33 @@
+import { createServerClient, type CookieOptions } from '@supabase/ssr'
+import { cookies } from 'next/headers'
+
+export function createClient() {
+  const cookieStore = cookies()
+
+  return createServerClient(
+    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
+    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
+    {
+      cookies: {
+        get(name: string) {
+          return cookieStore.get(name)?.value
+        },
+        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
+          try {
+            cookieStore.set({ name, value, ...options })
+          } catch (error) {
+            // Handle error
+          }
+        },
+        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
+          try {
+            cookieStore.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
+          } catch (error) {
+            // Handle error
+          }
+        },
+      },
+    }
+  )
+}
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,52 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, develop]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  lint-and-build:
+    name: Lint &amp; Build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
+        with:
+          version: 9
+
+      - name: Get pnpm store directory
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          echo "STORE_PATH=$(pnpm store path --silent)" &gt;&gt; $GITHUB_ENV
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm cache
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ${{ env.STORE_PATH }}
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-${{ hashFiles('**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Lint
+        run: pnpm lint
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: pnpm build
+        env:
+          NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL }}
+          NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+name: Deploy Web (Vercel)
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'apps/web/**'
+      - 'packages/**'
+      - 'pnpm-lock.yaml'
+
+jobs:
+  deploy-web:
+    name: Deploy Next.js to Vercel
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
+        with:
+          version: 9
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Deploy to Vercel
+        uses: amondnet/vercel-action@v25
+        with:
+          vercel-token: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
+          vercel-org-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
+          vercel-project-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID_WEB }}
+          working-directory: ./apps/web
+          vercel-args: '--prod'
+
```

Lines added: 68, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,68 @@
+name: Deploy Client (GitHub Pages)
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'apps/client/**'
+      - 'packages/**'
+      - 'pnpm-lock.yaml'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pages: write
+  id-token: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: "pages"
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Build Vite App
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+
+      - name: Setup pnpm
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
+        with:
+          version: 9
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build client app
+        run: pnpm --filter client build
+        env:
+          VITE_SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.VITE_SUPABASE_URL }}
+          VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
+
+      - name: Setup Pages
+        uses: actions/configure-pages@v4
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
+        with:
+          path: './apps/client/dist'
+
+  deploy:
+    name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
+    environment:
+      name: github-pages
+      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: build
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
+        id: deployment
+        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

项目结构已全部创建完成。下面是上传到 GitHub 并启用 CI/CD 的步骤：

---

## 项目结构

```
作业二/
├── .github/workflows/
│   ├── ci.yml              # PR/push 时自动 lint + build
│   ├── deploy-web.yml      # Next.js → Vercel 自动部署
│   └── deploy-client.yml   # Vite React → GitHub Pages 自动部署
├── apps/
│   ├── web/                # Next.js + shadcn/ui + Supabase
│   └── client/             # Vite + React + Tailwind
├── turbo.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
└── package.json
```

---

## 上传到 GitHub 的步骤

**1. 初始化 git 并推送**

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/训练营作业/作业二
git init
git add .
git commit -m "feat: init monorepo with Next.js + Vite + Supabase"
git remote add origin https://github.com/你的用户名/你的仓库名.git
git push -u origin main
```

**2. 配置 GitHub Secrets**

在 GitHub 仓库 → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions 中添加：

| Secret 名称 | 说明 |
|---|---|
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` | Supabase 项目 URL |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | Supabase anon key |
| `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` | 同上（给 Vite 用） |
| `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | 同上 |
| `VERCEL_TOKEN` | Vercel 访问 token |
| `VERCEL_ORG_ID` | Vercel 组织 ID |
| `VERCEL_PROJECT_ID_WEB` | Vercel 项目 ID |

**3. 启用 GitHub Pages**

仓库 → Settings → Pages → Source 选 **GitHub Actions**

---

## CI/CD 流程

- 推送到 `main` → 自动触发 CI（lint + build）
- `apps/web` 有变更 → 自动部署到 Vercel
- `apps/client` 有变更 → 自动部署到 GitHub Pages

**本地开发：**

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

好，结构清晰了。计划如下：

- **Next.js (`apps/web`)** — 服务端渲染的 TodoList，用 Server Actions 做 CRUD，直连 Supabase
- **Vite React (`apps/client`)** — 纯客户端 TodoList，用 Supabase JS SDK 做 CRUD

先把两个服务停掉，改完再重启：


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash** • Run command: (Success)</summary>

```bash
#Desc: 停止开发服务器
pkill -f "next dev" 2&gt;/dev/null; pkill -f "vite" 2&gt;/dev/null; echo "done"

done
```

</details>
</tool-use>

---

先创建 Supabase 数据库表的 SQL 脚本：


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write">

<details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write** • Edit file: /Users/liuhuiru/Desktop/训练营作业/作业二/supabase-schema.sql (Success)</summary>
**
Chunk 1**

Lines added: 33, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,33 @@
+-- 创建 todos 表
+create table if not exists todos (
+  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
+  title text not null,
+  completed boolean default false,
+  created_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null,
+  updated_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null
+);
+
+-- 启用 Row Level Security
+alter table todos enable row level security;
+
+-- 创建策略：允许所有操作（演示用，生产环境需要基于用户权限）
+create policy "Enable all operations for todos"
+  on todos
+  for all
+  using (true)
+  with check (true);
+
+-- 创建更新时间触发器
+create or replace function update_updated_at_column()
+returns trigger as $$
+begin
+  new.updated_at = now();
+  return new;
+end;
+$$ language plpgsql;
+
+create trigger update_todos_updated_at
+  before update on todos
+  for each row
+  execute function update_updated_at_column();
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

---

现在改造 Next.js 应用，添加 TodoList 功能：

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,79 @@
+"use server";
+
+import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
+import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
+import type { Todo } from "@/types/todo";
+
+export async function getTodos(): Promise&lt;Todo[]&gt; {
+  const supabase = createClient();
+  const { data, error } = await supabase
+    .from("todos")
+    .select("*")
+    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
+
+  if (error) {
+    console.error("Error fetching todos:", error);
+    return [];
+  }
+
+  return data || [];
+}
+
+export async function createTodo(title: string) {
+  const supabase = createClient();
+  const { error } = await supabase.from("todos").insert({ title });
+
+  if (error) {
+    console.error("Error creating todo:", error);
+    return { error: error.message };
+  }
+
+  revalidatePath("/");
+  return { success: true };
+}
+
+export async function toggleTodo(id: string, completed: boolean) {
+  const supabase = createClient();
+  const { error } = await supabase
+    .from("todos")
+    .update({ completed })
+    .eq("id", id);
+
+  if (error) {
+    console.error("Error updating todo:", error);
+    return { error: error.message };
+  }
+
+  revalidatePath("/");
+  return { success: true };
+}
+
+export async function deleteTodo(id: string) {
+  const supabase = createClient();
+  const { error } = await supabase.from("todos").delete().eq("id", id);
+
+  if (error) {
+    console.error("Error deleting todo:", error);
+    return { error: error.message };
+  }
+
+  revalidatePath("/");
+  return { success: true };
+}
+
+export async function updateTodo(id: string, title: string) {
+  const supabase = createClient();
+  const { error } = await supabase
+    .from("todos")
+    .update({ title })
+    .eq("id", id);
+
+  if (error) {
+    console.error("Error updating todo:", error);
+    return { error: error.message };
+  }
+
+  revalidatePath("/");
+  return { success: true };
+}
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,39 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useTransition } from "react";
+import { createTodo } from "@/app/actions";
+import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+import { PlusCircle } from "lucide-react";
+
+export function AddTodoForm() {
+  const [title, setTitle] = useState("");
+  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
+
+  function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    if (!title.trim()) return;
+
+    startTransition(async () =&gt; {
+      await createTodo(title.trim());
+      setTitle("");
+    });
+  }
+
+  return (
+    &lt;form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex gap-2"&gt;
+      &lt;Input
+        value={title}
+        onChange={(e) =&gt; setTitle(e.target.value)}
+        placeholder="添加新任务..."
+        disabled={isPending}
+        className="flex-1"
+      /&gt;
+      &lt;Button type="submit" disabled={isPending || !title.trim()}&gt;
+        &lt;PlusCircle className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /&gt;
+        添加
+      &lt;/Button&gt;
+    &lt;/form&gt;
+  );
+}
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

Lines added: 103, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,103 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useTransition } from "react";
+import { toggleTodo, deleteTodo, updateTodo } from "@/app/actions";
+import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox";
+import { Pencil, Trash2, Check, X } from "lucide-react";
+import type { Todo } from "@/types/todo";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+export function TodoItem({ todo }: { todo: Todo }) {
+  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
+  const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState(todo.title);
+  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
+
+  function handleToggle() {
+    startTransition(() =&gt; toggleTodo(todo.id, !todo.completed));
+  }
+
+  function handleDelete() {
+    startTransition(() =&gt; deleteTodo(todo.id));
+  }
+
+  function handleSaveEdit() {
+    if (!editTitle.trim()) return;
+    startTransition(async () =&gt; {
+      await updateTodo(todo.id, editTitle.trim());
+      setIsEditing(false);
+    });
+  }
+
+  function handleCancelEdit() {
+    setEditTitle(todo.title);
+    setIsEditing(false);
+  }
+
+  return (
+    &lt;div
+      className={cn(
+        "flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border bg-card transition-opacity",
+        isPending &amp;&amp; "opacity-50"
+      )}
+    &gt;
+      &lt;Checkbox
+        checked={todo.completed}
+        onCheckedChange={handleToggle}
+        disabled={isPending}
+      /&gt;
+
+      {isEditing ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex flex-1 gap-2"&gt;
+          &lt;Input
+            value={editTitle}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setEditTitle(e.target.value)}
+            onKeyDown={(e) =&gt; {
+              if (e.key === "Enter") handleSaveEdit();
+              if (e.key === "Escape") handleCancelEdit();
+            }}
+            className="flex-1 h-8"
+            autoFocus
+          /&gt;
+          &lt;Button size="icon" variant="ghost" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={handleSaveEdit}&gt;
+            &lt;Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" /&gt;
+          &lt;/Button&gt;
+          &lt;Button size="icon" variant="ghost" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={handleCancelEdit}&gt;
+            &lt;X className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" /&gt;
+          &lt;/Button&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;&gt;
+          &lt;span
+            className={cn(
+              "flex-1 text-sm",
+              todo.completed &amp;&amp; "line-through text-muted-foreground"
+            )}
+          &gt;
+            {todo.title}
+          &lt;/span&gt;
+          &lt;Button
+            size="icon"
+            variant="ghost"
+            className="h-8 w-8"
+            onClick={() =&gt; setIsEditing(true)}
+            disabled={isPending}
+          &gt;
+            &lt;Pencil className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" /&gt;
+          &lt;/Button&gt;
+          &lt;Button
+            size="icon"
+            variant="ghost"
+            className="h-8 w-8"
+            onClick={handleDelete}
+            disabled={isPending}
+          &gt;
+            &lt;Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /&gt;
+          &lt;/Button&gt;
+        &lt;/&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/div&gt;
+  );
+}
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+import * as React from "react";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+export interface InputProps
+  extends React.InputHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt; {}
+
+const Input = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLInputElement, InputProps&gt;(
+  ({ className, type, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {
+    return (
+      &lt;input
+        type={type}
+        className={cn(
+          "flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
+          className
+        )}
+        ref={ref}
+        {...props}
+      /&gt;
+    );
+  }
+);
+Input.displayName = "Input";
+
+export { Input };
+
```

```diff
+import * as React from "react";
+import * as CheckboxPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-checkbox";
+import { Check } from "lucide-react";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+const Checkbox = React.forwardRef&lt;
+  React.ElementRef&lt;typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root&gt;,
+  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef&lt;typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root&gt;
+&gt;(({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (
+  &lt;CheckboxPrimitive.Root
+    ref={ref}
+    className={cn(
+      "peer h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-sm border border-primary ring-offset-background focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=checked]:bg-primary data-[state=checked]:text-primary-foreground",
+      className
+    )}
+    {...props}
+  &gt;
+    &lt;CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator
+      className={cn("flex items-center justify-center text-current")}
+    &gt;
+      &lt;Check className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+    &lt;/CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator&gt;
+  &lt;/CheckboxPrimitive.Root&gt;
+));
+Checkbox.displayName = CheckboxPrimitive.Root.displayName;
+
+export { Checkbox };
+
```

</tool-use>

```diff
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+import { supabase } from "@/lib/supabase";
 import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";

+import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+import { PlusCircle, Trash2, Pencil, Check, X, ClipboardList } from "lucide-react";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 
+type Todo = {
+  id: string;
+  title: string;
+  completed: boolean;
+  created_at: string;
+};
+
 function App() {
+  const [todos, setTodos] = useState&lt;Todo[]&gt;([]);
+  const [newTitle, setNewTitle] = useState("");
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+  const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState("");
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchTodos();
+  }, []);
+
+  async function fetchTodos() {
+    const { data } = await supabase
+      .from("todos")
+      .select("*")
+      .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
+    setTodos(data || []);
+    setLoading(false);
+  }
+
+  async function addTodo(e: React.FormEvent) {
+    e.preventDefault();
+    if (!newTitle.trim()) return;
+    const { data } = await supabase
+      .from("todos")
+      .insert({ title: newTitle.trim() })
+      .select()
+      .single();
+    if (data) setTodos([data, ...todos]);
+    setNewTitle("");
+  }
+
+  async function toggleTodo(id: string, completed: boolean) {
+    await supabase.from("todos").update({ completed }).eq("id", id);
+    setTodos(todos.map((t) =&gt; (t.id === id ? { ...t, completed } : t)));
+  }
+
+  async function deleteTodo(id: string) {
+    await supabase.from("todos").delete().eq("id", id);
+    setTodos(todos.filter((t) =&gt; t.id !== id));
+  }
+
+  async function saveEdit(id: string) {
+    if (!editTitle.trim()) return;
+    await supabase.from("todos").update({ title: editTitle.trim() }).eq("id", id);
+    setTodos(todos.map((t) =&gt; (t.id === id ? { ...t, title: editTitle.trim() } : t)));
+    setEditingId(null);
+  }
+
+  const completedCount = todos.filter((t) =&gt; t.completed).length;
+
   return (
```

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write">

<details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write** • Edit file: /Users/liuhuiru/Desktop/训练营作业/作业二/apps/client/src/components/ui/input.tsx (Success)</summary>
**
Chunk 1**

Lines added: 25, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,25 @@
+import * as React from "react";
+import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+
+export interface InputProps
+  extends React.InputHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt; {}
+
+const Input = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLInputElement, InputProps&gt;(
+  ({ className, type, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {
+    return (
+      &lt;input
+        type={type}
+        className={cn(
+          "flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
+          className
+        )}
+        ref={ref}
+        {...props}
+      /&gt;
+    );
+  }
+);
+Input.displayName = "Input";
+
+export { Input };
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+# 全栈 Monorepo TodoList 项目

 ## 技术栈
 
 - **Monorepo**: pnpm workspace + Turborepo
-- **前端框架**: Next.js + React + Vite
+- **前端框架**: Next.js (SSR) + Vite React (CSR)
 - **UI 组件**: shadcn/ui
 - **样式**: Tailwind CSS
-- **后端服务**: Supabase
+- **后端服务**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
 - **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions
 
 ## 项目结构
```

```diff
@@ -16,40 +16,86 @@
 &#96;&#96;&#96;
 .
 ├── apps/
-│   ├── web/          # Next.js 应用
-│   └── client/       # Vite React 应用
-├── packages/
-│   └── ui/           # 共享 UI 组件
+│   ├── web/          # Next.js 应用 (Server Actions + SSR)
+│   └── client/       # Vite React 应用 (Client-side)
+├── supabase-schema.sql  # 数据库表结构
 ├── turbo.json
 ├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
 └── package.json
 &#96;&#96;&#96;
 
-## 开发
+## 快速开始
 
+### 1. 安装依赖
+
 &#96;&#96;&#96;bash
-# 安装依赖
 pnpm install
-
-# 启动开发服务器
-pnpm dev
-
-# 构建所有应用
-pnpm build
-
-# 代码检查
-pnpm lint
 &#96;&#96;&#96;
 
-## 环境变量
+### 2. 配置 Supabase
 
-在每个应用目录下创建 &#96;.env.local&#96; 文件：
+1. 在 [Supabase](https://supabase.com) 创建项目
+2. 在 SQL Editor 中执行 &#96;supabase-schema.sql&#96; 创建 todos 表
+3. 获取项目 URL 和 anon key
 
+### 3. 配置环境变量
+
+**Next.js 应用** (&#96;apps/web/.env.local&#96;):
 &#96;&#96;&#96;env
 NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
 NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_supabase_anon_key
 &#96;&#96;&#96;
 
+**Vite 应用** (&#96;apps/client/.env.local&#96;):
+&#96;&#96;&#96;env
+VITE_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
+VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_supabase_anon_key
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+### 4. 启动开发服务器
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
+# 启动所有应用
+pnpm dev
+
+# 或单独启动
+pnpm --filter web dev      # Next.js: http://localhost:3000
+pnpm --filter client dev   # Vite: http://localhost:5173
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+## 功能特性
+
+### Next.js 应用 (apps/web)
+- ✅ Server Components + Server Actions
+- ✅ 服务端渲染 (SSR)
+- ✅ 完整 CRUD 操作
+- ✅ 乐观更新 (useTransition)
+
+### Vite React 应用 (apps/client)
+- ✅ 纯客户端渲染
+- ✅ Supabase JS SDK
+- ✅ 完整 CRUD 操作
+- ✅ 实时状态管理
+
 ## 部署
 
-项目配置了 GitHub Actions 自动部署流程，推送到 main 分支时会自动触发部署。
+项目配置了 GitHub Actions 自动部署：
+
+- **Next.js** → Vercel
+- **Vite React** → GitHub Pages
+
+推送到 &#96;main&#96; 分支时自动触发部署。
+
+### GitHub Secrets 配置
+
+在仓库 Settings → Secrets 中添加：
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
+NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
+VITE_SUPABASE_URL
+VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
+VERCEL_TOKEN
+VERCEL_ORG_ID
+VERCEL_PROJECT_ID_WEB
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
```

两个应用都已改造完成，现在都是完整的 TodoList：

- **http://localhost:3000** — Next.js 版（Server Actions + SSR）
- **http://localhost:5173** — Vite React 版（纯客户端）

**在使用前需要配置 Supabase：**

1. 去 [supabase.com](https://supabase.com) 创建项目
2. 在 SQL Editor 里执行根目录的 `supabase-schema.sql` 建表
3. 分别创建环境变量文件：

```bash
# apps/web/.env.local
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=你的URL
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=你的Key

# apps/client/.env.local
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=你的URL
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=你的Key
```

配置好后刷新页面就能看到完整的增删改查功能了。

查看代理端口的方法：

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash** • Run command: (Success)</summary>

```bash
#Desc: 检查环境变量中的代理端口

```

</details>

---

环境变量里没有代理配置。常见的代理软件端口：

- **Clash**: 7890
- **ClashX**: 7890
- **V2rayU**: 1087
- **Shadowsocks**: 1080

你可以：
1. 打开你的代理软件，查看 HTTP 代理端口
2. 或者在系统偏好设置 → 网络 → 高级 → 代理 里查看

找到端口后告诉我，或者直接在终端执行：

```bash
# 假设端口是 7890
cd "/Users/liuhuiru/Desktop/训练营作业/作业二"
git config --global http.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890
git config --global https.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890
git push -u origin main
```

```bash
origin	https://github.com/liuhuiru/fullstack-todolist-monorepo.git (fetch)
```

现在在终端执行：

```bash
cd "/Users/liuhuiru/Desktop/训练营作业/作业二"
git push -u origin main
```

如果提示输入密码，需要用 GitHub Personal Access Token（不是密码）：

1. 访问 https://github.com/settings/tokens
2. 点击 **Generate new token (classic)**
3. 勾选 `repo` 权限
4. 生成后复制 token
5. 在终端粘贴 token 作为密码

或者你也可以先配置 credential helper 避免每次输入：

```bash
git config --global credential.helper osxkeychain
```

然后再 push，输入一次 token 后会保存。

会问几个问题，按这样回答：

- Project name? → 直接回车（用默认名）
- In which directory is your code located? → 直接回车

完成后告诉我。
